title: psychotria costivenia var. altorum
intro: Psychotria costivenia var. altorum, also known as the "Golden Shield" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Psychotria costivenia var. altorum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
